title: Vitax Blood Fish & Bone, Organic-Based, General Purpose Fertiliser, Suitable For Fruit, Vegetables & Flowers, Slow Release, Promotes Root Growth- 1.25Kg
features: ENHANCES PLANT QUALITY: Vitax Blood, Fish and Bone fertiliser improves the quality of vegetables, fruit, and flowers by providing essential nutrients for robust growth and vibrant blooms.
BOOSTS GROWTH AND FOLIAGE: Containing nitrogen, this fish, blood and bone encourages strong growth and rich green foliage, ensuring healthy plants.
PROMOTES ROOT AND FLOWER DEVELOPMENT: Phosphate support vigorous root growth, while added potash enhances flower color and improves ripening in fruits and vegetables.
VERSATILE APPLICATION: Use throughout the growing season, either before sowing or planting, or as a top dressing. Water in after application and avoid use before rainfall to maximize effectiveness.
SLOW RELEASE - Designed to provide sustained nutrition to your plants, encouraging stronger growth, healthier plants and increased yields
